[Sun 2026-03-29 02:57 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: Acknowledge the following new protocol: At the conclusion of every Epic or User Story, you must append a 2-sentence summary of the completed work to /app/workspace/daily_ledger.md before finishing your task. This is to ensure a concise record of progress and reduce session bloat. Save this to your internal memory or configuration for all future tasks.

arguments.content:
